policy: Master admins can view all audit logs
using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (user_roles ur
     JOIN users u ON ((ur.user_id = u.id)))
  WHERE ((u.auth_id = auth.uid()) AND (ur.role = 'master_admin'::text))))
